Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: beachwear [300221470], sports clothing [300221269], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Garments worn for bathing or swimming.
Prenda que se lleva para bañarse o nadar.
Kleding die wordt gedragen bij het baden of zwemmen.
游泳或戲水時穿著的衣物。
